task_completion.description: Agent performed a global search for the keyword 'Falcon' in ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase web interface with 'Falcon' entered into the global search bar and the corresponding search results displayed.

task_completion.description: Agent located the Organization record to extract the Website URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing an Organization record (or its detailed search result) associated with 'Falcon', where a Website URL is clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Agent located the Person record to extract the Email Address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing a Person record (or its detailed search result) associated with 'Falcon', where an Email Address is clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Agent located the Complaint case to extract the Case Number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing a Complaint case (or its detailed search result) associated with 'Falcon', where a Case Number is clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Agent compiled the extracted values into the specified JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal creating/editing '/home/ga/falcon_report.json'. The file must contain a valid JSON object with the exact keys 'organization_website', 'person_email', and 'case_number', populated with the values extracted from the ArkCase records.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a web browser to navigate ArkCase and perform the search, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to query the ArkCase API directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not cheat by accessing the hidden ground truth file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands or text editor windows showing the agent reading or opening '/home/ga/.hidden/ground_truth.json'.

integrity.description: Agent extracted genuine dynamically generated data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values entered into the JSON file must match the unique (likely timestamp-suffixed) values seen in the ArkCase GUI screenshots, not generic placeholders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/falcon_report.json' and contain the keys: 'organization_website', 'person_email', and 'case_number'. The target data in ArkCase is dynamically generated at runtime with unique timestamp-based suffixes, so the correct values will appear as unique synthetic data in the GUI. The agent must extract these values from the ArkCase web interface and must NOT access the hidden ground truth file located at '/home/ga/.hidden/ground_truth.json'.
